title: Lead Investment Banker at HDFC Ergo

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at HDFC Ergo
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, HDFC Ergo in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Ergo:
HDFC Ergo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Ergo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
